metadata.description: CLI and agent skills for investigating GitHub PR review comments and executing human-approved closeout plans

plugins.name: resolve-reviews
plugins.description: Investigate all PR review comments, then execute the human-approved fix/reply/resolve/commit/push closeout plan

plugins.name: resolve-agent-reviews
plugins.description: Investigate PR review bot findings, then execute the human-approved fix/reply/resolve/commit/push closeout plan

plugins.name: resolve-human-reviews
plugins.description: Investigate human PR review comments, then execute the human-approved fix/reply/resolve/commit/push closeout plan
